text:
Iconic from every angle. This is the Emirates A380. 🫳🏻🎤

#Emirates #FlyBetter

Eid Mubarak from all of us at Emirates 🌙✨

🌙✨ طيران الإمارات تتمنى لكم عيد مبارك 

#Emirates #FlyBetter #Eid #EidAlFitr

Born to be airborne. 🛫

The Emirates A350 is flying to more and more cities every month. Where do you want our newest aircraft to fly to next?

#Emirates #FlyBetter

Emirates Cabin Crew - reporting for duty. 🫡

#Emirates #FlyBetter

The anatomy of the Emirates A380 - the world's largest passenger aircraft. 

From our First Class Suites and the iconic Shower Spa, to the Onboard Lounge and spacious Premium Economy cabins. Flying doesn't get any better than this. 

#Emirates #FlyBetter

In Shenzhen, the energy never clocks out. Sunrise brings the hustle. Sunset brings the glow. ✨

With daily direct flights from Dubai, China’s Silicon Valley is closer than ever.

#Emirates #FlyBetter

A moment of tranquility above the clouds. There's no other place we'd rather be. 🌙✈️

#Emirates #FlyBetter

Flying with us during Ramadan? You’ll be able to enjoy our signature Ramadan services and special Iftar boxes. 

Thoughtfully prepared, they’re filled with everything you need to break your fast in-flight. 

#Emirates #FlyBetter

Ramadan Kareem from all of us at Emirates🌙✨

 طيران الإمارات تتمنى لكم رمضان كريم 🌙✨

#Emirates #FlyBetter

Happy Lunar New Year from all of us at Emirates. 马年行大运！🐎🧧 

May the Year of the Horse carry you toward new horizons.

#Emirates #FlyBetter
The @emirates Cabin Crew showed out for the NBA All-Star Game Ball Delivery! ✈️🏀
